kafkaconnect.connector.s3logdelivery.Buc.Description: The name of the S3 bucket that is the destination for log delivery.

kafkaconnect.connector.s3logdelivery.Ena.Description: Specifies whether connector logs get sent to the specified Amazon S3 destination.

kafkaconnect.connector.s3logdelivery.Pre.Description: The S3 prefix that is the destination for log delivery.
